ksa_text: Design enterprise information architecture and systems to support organizational objectives, including alignment of data architecture with business strategy and capability delivery.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: Data Governance (affinity 0.58) with insufficient REG signals (0). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4629). pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Lifecycle Manager.
